dashboard.farm_overview: Here's what's happening with your farm today
dashboard.feed_usage_subtitle: Daily feed usage accounting for flock growth and size
dashboard.feed_graph_data_source_title: Where Does This Data Come From?
dashboard.feed_graph_step1_text: When you click "Record Usage" in the Daily Inventory Usage widget on your dashboard, the app inserts a record into the database table called
dashboard.feed_graph_step3_title: Step 3: How the Graph Calculates Totals
dashboard.feed_graph_step3_text2: table, finds all records for each day, and sums them up. If you see 33 bags on a day, it means there are one or more records in
dashboard.feed_graph_suspicious_title: Important: If 33 Bags Doesn't Make Sense
dashboard.feed_graph_suspicious_text: If you see a high number like 33 bags and your inventory would be negative, it could mean:
dashboard.feed_graph_suspicious_duplicate: Duplicate entries: The same usage was recorded multiple times
dashboard.feed_graph_suspicious_wrong_qty: Wrong quantity: The quantity was entered incorrectly (e.g., 33 instead of 3.3)
dashboard.feed_graph_suspicious_unit: Unit mismatch: The unit was wrong (e.g., kg entered as bags, or vice versa)
dashboard.feed_graph_suspicious_date: Wrong date: Usage was recorded for the wrong date
dashboard.feed_graph_verify_method1: Method 1: Click on any row in the "Daily Usage Details" table below to see all individual records for that day.
dashboard.feed_graph_verify_method2: Method 2: Open your browser's Developer Console (F12 → Console tab) and look for logs starting with
dashboard.feed_graph_verify_method2_text: These show every single record with its ID, quantity, unit, and timestamp.
dashboard.feed_graph_no_data_text: Start recording feed usage to see trends and analytics
dashboard.feed_graph_no_data_source: Data is collected from feed givings, inventory usage, and feed logs
dashboard.feed_graph_records_detail_subtitle: Individual records from the Usage Widget (inventory_usage table)
dashboard.feed_graph_records_note_text: If the total seems incorrect, check:
dashboard.feed_graph_records_note_duplicate: Are there duplicate entries for the same feed type on this day?
dashboard.feed_graph_records_note_qty: Was the quantity entered correctly in the Usage Widget?
dashboard.feed_graph_records_note_unit: Was the unit (bags vs kg) correct when recording?
dashboard.feed_graph_suspicious_days: days show suspiciously high feed usage (possibly duplicate entries or data errors).
dashboard.feed_graph_missing_days: days with missing feed data despite active flocks.
dashboard.feed_graph_low_days: days show feed usage significantly below expected levels.
dashboard.feed_graph_ensure_recorded: Feed usage should generally increase as birds grow. Please ensure all feed givings are recorded.
dashboard.create_first_flock_desc: Create your first flock to start tracking and managing your poultry operations
dashboard.no_flocks_yet_worker: No flocks set up yet. Your manager will add flocks when ready.
dashboard.add_feed_to_start: Add feed or inventory items to start tracking usage
dashboard.quick_record_usage: Quick record what you used today
dashboard.select_flock_to_track_weights: Select a flock to track weights
dashboard.failed_to_record_usage: Failed to record usage. Please try again.
dashboard.backdating_note: Backdating: This will record usage for a past date

settings.title: Settings
settings.limit_description: Maximum number of tasks to show per flock per day
settings.flock_lifecycle_description: Configure how long flocks stay in your farm and define the different phases they go through.
settings.flock_lifecycle_broiler_duration_desc: Total number of weeks broilers will stay in your farm
settings.flock_lifecycle_layer_duration_desc: Total number of weeks layers will stay in your farm
settings.flock_lifecycle_cannot_add_phase: Cannot add phase beyond total duration. Please increase total duration first.
settings.flock_lifecycle_validation_week_range: Phase "{{phaseName}}" has invalid week range (must be 1-{{maxWeek}})
settings.flock_lifecycle_validation_start_end: Phase "{{phaseName}}" has start week greater than end week
settings.flock_lifecycle_validation_not_connected: Phase "{{phaseName}}" does not connect with previous phase
settings.flock_targets_description: Configure growth targets and lifecycle phases for broilers and layers
settings.reset_targets_confirm: Reset to default targets? This will overwrite your custom settings.
settings.feed_intake_description: Set expected feed intake in grams per bird per day for each week. Use "Add more weeks" to extend beyond the default.
settings.broiler_weeks_hint: Broilers typically reach market at 6–8 weeks. Add more if you keep them longer.
settings.layer_weeks_hint: Layers can produce for 72+ weeks. Add more weeks for long-term planning.
settings.custom_currency_selected: Custom currency selected. Please specify your currency details.
settings.currency_code_desc: 3-letter ISO currency code (e.g., JPY for Japanese Yen)
settings.currency_symbol_desc: Symbol to display with amounts (optional, defaults to currency code)
settings.currency_auto_set: Currency is automatically set based on your country
settings.legacy_currency_desc: For backward compatibility with older expenses
settings.exchange_rate_desc: Used for currency conversions in reports (1 {{currency}} = ? USD)
settings.eggs_per_tray_desc: Number of eggs in one tray (typically 30)
settings.cost_per_egg_override_desc: Override automatic cost calculation (leave empty for automatic)
settings.feed_unit_desc: The unit used to measure feed (bags, kg, grams, tonnes). When using bags, set the weight per bag below.
settings.feed_quantity_per_bag_desc: One bag equals this many kilograms. Enter 50 for 50 kg bags, 25 for 25 kg bags, etc. All internal calculations use grams—this setting converts bags to kg for display.
settings.manager_permissions_desc: Control what managers can access and do
settings.permissions_note: These permissions only affect managers. Owners always have full access, workers have limited task access, and viewers are read-only across the entire system.
settings.permissions_financial_desc: Control manager access to financial data and operations
settings.permissions_view_financials_desc: Allows managers to view expenses, sales, revenue, and profit data
settings.permissions_create_expenses_desc: Allows managers to add and modify expense records
settings.permissions_create_sales_desc: Allows managers to create and manage sales, receipts, and invoices
settings.permissions_edit_flock_costs_desc: Allows managers to modify flock purchase prices and transport costs
settings.permissions_operations_desc: Control manager access to operational features
settings.permissions_manage_inventory_desc: Allows managers to add feed types, adjust stock, and track inventory
settings.permissions_edit_shifts_desc: Allows managers to create and modify recurring shift schedules
settings.permissions_mark_vaccinations_desc: Allows managers to record vaccination administration
settings.permissions_edit_feed_water_desc: Allows managers to edit feed and water consumption records by week
settings.permissions_edit_eggs_desc: Allows managers to edit egg collection and egg sale records when there is a recording error
settings.permissions_team_payroll_desc: Control manager access to sensitive team operations
settings.permissions_manage_team_desc: Allows managers to invite members, change roles, and manage team status
settings.permissions_manage_payroll_desc: Allows managers to process payroll runs and adjustments
settings.permissions_delete_records_desc: Allows managers to permanently delete records across the system
settings.geolocation_not_supported: Geolocation not supported by your browser
settings.coordinates_detected: Coordinates detected. Address lookup failed - please enter manually.
settings.location_denied: Location access denied. Please enable location in your browser.
settings.location_error: Could not get your location. Please enter manually.
settings.farm_location_desc: Help us locate your farm precisely
settings.additional_notes_placeholder: e.g., Behind the school, Turn left at gas station
settings.share_location: Share my location with suppliers for delivery estimates
settings.location_why_needed: Why we need this: Supplier delivery estimates, connect with nearby farmers, local weather data (future). Your exact location is private and only shared with your consent.
settings.team_contacts_desc: Add team members for quick report sharing via WhatsApp
settings.phone_number_desc: Include country code (e.g., +237 for Cameroon) or we'll add it automatically
settings.add_contacts_desc: Add contacts to quickly share reports via WhatsApp
settings.confirm_delete_contact: Are you sure you want to delete this contact?

compare.insight_savings: Applying {{flock}}'s efficiency to all flocks could save ~{{savings}}
